basics.name: Soner Çelik
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with a focus on modern web technologies and enterprise solutions. Skilled in every part of Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, AWS, React.js, and Low Code platforms, I specialize in building scalable, integrated web applications.

work.name: Experteam
highlights: Providing technical consultancy and end-to-end solution design for enterprise clients, leading integration and web application development projects on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
Designing and implementing complex integration flows using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), connecting ERP modules with third-party systems via REST and SOAP web services.
Developing dynamic web applications leveraging Oracle Visual Builder (VBCS) to support business process automation.
Tech stack: OIC, VBCS, Oracle Database, PL/SQL, OCI, REST, SOAP, JavaScript

work.name: NTT DATA Business Solutions
highlights: Designing and implementing advanced data integration solutions, developing API servers, and creating dynamic web applications using containerized environments to streamline business processes and enhance scalability.
Tech Stack: JavaScript, ReactJS, nodeJS, SAP Cloud Inf, HANA, SQL

work.name: Apps Akademi
highlights: Delivering integrations and applications through Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, using frameworks powered by Oracle Database.
e-Invoice: Fetching incoming invoices from government or integrator portal through web services and loading them into appropriate ERP module (FIN/SCM)
e-Despatch: All the technical design, documentation and development.
Tech stack: Oracle Database, PL/SQL, VBCS, OIC, APEX, Oracle JET, Javascript, Oracle ADF, Java, OCI Functions, OCI Object Storage, REST, SOAP

work.name: Huawei
highlights: Worked in an IntelliJ Platform Plugin project which enables developers to work in the HarmonyOS ecosystem.
Tech stack: Java, Swing, CI/CD, Jenkins, Gradle, HTML, CSS, Javascript

work.name: Apps Akademi
highlights: ERP-Retail Software (Micros, Robotpos) Integration into Financial Cloud and Supply Chain Cloud (VBCS, OIC)
Daily Rates Integration from Central Bank of Turkey (OIC)
